completion_criteria_checked: A bounded dual-restart proof artifact or helper exists.
The proof uses the generated advisor restart brief, the generated worker directive, and canonical repo truth as its primary inputs.
The result clearly shows how both a fresh advisor session and a fresh worker session can resume cold and complete one PCC cycle without owner re-briefing.
The change stays within the approved V1 scope and preserves local deterministic behavior.
The helper stays within the approved V1 scope and uses local deterministic logic.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.
risks: Live state is still not validated against JSON Schema at runtime.
Restart safety is now provable on demand for both roles, but not yet enforced automatically before every fresh-session handoff.
Advisor restart brief freshness still depends on explicit regeneration before the dual-restart proof or a fresh advisor entry.
summary: Claude completed the bounded pcc-v1-008 task within scope by adding a deterministic dual-restart proof that validates both advisor and worker fresh-session restart safety from canonical repo truth.
next_action: Pause at the natural break, review the proven restart-safe foundation, and choose whether to implement enforcement follow-ons or pivot to broader PCC ideas.
